name: vendor.myndhyve.kanban
description: MyndHyve kanban-coordination pack. 7 nodes covering board lifecycle, task management (assign + AI-powered decompose), timeline planning, automation rules, and resource monitoring. Routes through ctx.kanban.* host adapter.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Kanban Board Create
nodes.description: Creates a new kanban board with columns. Side-effectful + cacheable — replays return the originally-created boardId.

nodes.label: Kanban Board Review
nodes.description: Reads board state with per-column task counts + at-risk tasks summary. Used in review workflows + executive dashboards.

nodes.label: Kanban Task Assign
nodes.description: Assigns a task to an agent or user. Cancels existing assignment if present (single-assignee model).

nodes.label: Kanban Task Decompose
nodes.description: AI-powered task decomposition: takes a high-level task description and returns N subtasks with dependencies. Routes through host's AI envelope adapter (peer dep host.aiEnvelope required).

nodes.label: Kanban Timeline Plan
nodes.description: Generates a schedule for board tasks given resource constraints + dependencies. Returns per-task start/end dates + critical-path identification.

nodes.label: Kanban Workflow Automate
nodes.description: Configures automation rules on a board (trigger on column transition, due-date, label change). Returns active rule count.

nodes.label: Kanban Resource Monitor
nodes.description: Reports resource utilization across the board (assignee load, column WIP limits, overdue tasks). Surfaces alerts for over-allocated resources.
